opinion.h: GAIR ET AL. v. PECK ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF NEW YORK, NEW YORK COUNTY. No. 544. Decided January 25, 1960.
opinion.p: Louis J. Lefkowitz, Attorney General of New York, and James O. Moore, Jr. for appellees.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
361 U.S. 374 TAYLOR v. TAYLOR. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF KANSAS. No. 552. Decided January 25, 1960.
Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
The appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
